purpose: Define the minimum payment evidence Autofolio may retain for verified signup and manual bank-transfer approval before any production launch.
non_goals: No real bank account number, raw bank statement, customer payment record, or customer PII is stored in this repository.
No bank API, open-banking API, PG, virtual account, OAuth, production DB, or deploy action is performed by this policy.
No automatic account activation is authorized by this policy.
No refund, receipt, tax, accounting, or legal conclusion is finalized by this policy.

allowed_evidence_sources.label: Owner manually checks bank app or statement outside Autofolio
Autofolio matches deposit code, amount, applicant name, and contact from pasted text
Owner imports a reviewed CSV extract after retention and privacy review
Payment provider or virtual account reference after provider contract review

audit_invariants.statement: Raw pasted bank statement or CSV text is processed in memory and is not persisted by default.
Production payment evidence stores only the retained_fields allowlist after redaction.
Applicant-facing status lookup must not expose Owner notes, audit events, account grant internals, or private payment evidence.
Payment matching may assist a reviewer, but account activation requires an explicit audited privileged action or a separately approved automation policy.
Real bank account numbers and payment records must not be committed to repository files.
Refund, receipt, tax, and accounting treatment require a separate reviewed operating record before paid external users.
